zh.lifeSummary: 當Eva de Chaworth於大約1250年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾肯普斯福德時，她的父親Patrick de Chaworth32歲，母親Hawise de London40歲。她於1269年10月18日之前與Robert de Tibetot結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1300年8月30日之前在英國素福爾可內特萊斯亞德，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可易普斯維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eva de Chaworth于大约1250年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾肯普斯福德时，她的父亲Patrick de Chaworth32岁，母亲Hawise de London40岁。她于1269年10月18日之前与Robert de Tibetot结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1300年8月30日之前在英国素福爾可內特萊斯亞德，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可易普斯維其。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chaworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Haworth (Yorkshire), probably from Old English haga ‘hedge, enclosure’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Howarth
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Howarth in Rochdale (Lancashire), possibly from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + worth ‘enclosure’. The name may have been confused with Haworth .

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Eva de Chaworth was born about 1250, in Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Patrick de Chaworth, was 32 and her mother, Hawise de London, was 40. She married Robert de Tibetot before 18 October 1269. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died before 30 August 1300, in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, and was buried in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eva de Chaworth est née environ 1250, à Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Patrick de Chaworth, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Hawise de London, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Tibetot avant 18 octobre 1269. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée avant 30 août 1300, à Nettlestead, Suffolk, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eva de Chaworth um 1250 in Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Patrick de Chaworth 32 und ihre Mutter Hawise de London 40. Sie hat vor 18. Oktober 1269 Robert de Tibetot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 30. August 1300 in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England und wurde in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eva de Chaworth è nata il circa 1250 nel Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Patrick de Chaworth, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Hawise de London, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Tibetot prima del 18 ottobre 1269. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 30 agosto 1300, nel Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, e fu sepolta a Ipswich, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eva de Chaworthが約1250年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアケンプスフォードで生まれた時，父Patrick de Chaworthは32歳，母Hawise de Londonは40歳であった。1269年10月18日以前にRobert de Tibetotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1300年8月30日以前にイギリススフォルクネットレステアドで死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクイプスウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.Gascoigne, France: 캐나다 서스캐처원 디어 포크스 노. 2 가스코익니
ko.lifeSummary: Eva de Chaworth(이)가 대략 1250년 영국 그루스스터실르 케프스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Patrick de Chaworth(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise de London(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1269년 10월 18일 이전 Robert de Tibetot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 8월 30일 이전 영국 수폴크 네틀레스테아드에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이프스위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eva de Chaworth nasceu aproximadamente 1250, em Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Patrick de Chaworth, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de London, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Tibetot antes 18 de outubro de 1269. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 30 de agosto de 1300, em Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Gascoigne, France: гаскоигн, дир форкс но. 2, Саскачеван, Канада
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eva de Chaworth родилась около 1250 г. в местности кемпсфорд, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Patrick de Chaworth было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Hawise de London, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Tibetot перед 18 октябрь 1269 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла перед 30 августа 1300 г. в местности неттлестид, суффолк, Англия и была похоронена в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Robert de Tibetot antes de 18 de octubre de 1269. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 30 de agosto de 1300, en Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
